summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new RTI Sync Engine feature. All backend APIs working correctly (8/9 tests passed, 1 skipped). Frontend RTI Sync wizard page loads correctly with all required elements: HMRC compliance disclaimers, 6-step wizard, pay run selection, approval workflow, and recent submissions panel. Full workflow tested: prepare → request approval → approve → submit to HMRC (sandbox mode).

issues: Compliance score shows '00%' instead of '100%' in the circular gauge - display formatting issue (noted in previous iterations)

passed_tests: RTI Sync status - GET /api/rti-sync/status (returns engine_mode, company_configured, settings, disclaimers)
RTI Sync submissions list - GET /api/rti-sync/submissions (returns submissions array with total count)
RTI health check existing - GET /api/rti-sync/health-check/{payrun_id} (returns ready_for_rti, score, blocking_issues)
RTI full workflow - prepare → request approval → approve → submit (all steps working)
RTI approve wrong confirmation - POST /api/rti-sync/submissions/{id}/approve (returns 400 for wrong text)
RTI receipts list - GET /api/rti-sync/receipts (returns receipts array with total count)
RTI audit trail - GET /api/rti-sync/submissions/{id}/audit-trail (returns audit_entries with immutable hashes)
Frontend: RTI Sync page loads at /rti-sync
Frontend: HMRC compliance disclaimers displayed (4 bullet points)
Frontend: 6-step wizard (Select → Validate → Prepare → Approve → Submit → Done)
Frontend: Pay run selection with status badges
Frontend: Approval workflow with confirmation text input
Frontend: HMRC RTI Guidance link in Resources
action_items: Fix compliance score display showing '00%' instead of '100%' on dashboard (known issue from previous iterations)
critical_code_review_comments: RTI Sync Engine properly implements event-driven architecture with state machine (PREPARING → QUEUED → APPROVAL_PENDING → APPROVED → SUBMITTED)
Human-in-the-loop approval requires exact confirmation text: 'I confirm submission {submission_id}'
Immutable audit entries include cryptographic hashes (SHA-256) for verification
HMRC Gateway submission in SANDBOX mode returns mock success responses
Live submission requires HMRC_GATEWAY_ID and HMRC_GATEWAY_PASSWORD environment variables
All RTI routes properly protected with authentication and role-based access (payroll_admin or owner)
updated_files: /app/tests/test_rti_sync_engine.py - Created comprehensive test suite for RTI Sync Engine
seed_data_creation: Created new pay run (payrun_e0f7bd778df9) and RTI submission (rti_3ff4be7a7b5a480a) during testing. Multiple submissions exist in various states for testing.

mocked_apis.HMRC Gateway (sandbox mode): Returns mock success response with correlation_id and poll_url
mocked_apis.Email notifications (Resend): Uses mock implementation until RESEND_API_KEY is set

context_for_next_testing_agent: RTI Sync Engine fully tested and working. Key features: SANDBOX mode by default, human approval required with exact confirmation text, immutable audit trails with SHA-256 hashes. Test company has PAYE reference (123/ABC123) and Accounts Office Reference configured. Multiple RTI submissions exist in database in various states (queued, approval_pending, approved, submitted). Use test_rti_sync_engine.py for regression testing.
